violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -The prep table, walls, and tables all need a deep cleaning. The establishment has been in storage for the winter.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. -The fan cover on the rear of the vehicle is missing leaving an unsealed opening. The owner informed it came off sometime in the winter and is in the process of repairing.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Walls and ceiling will need a deep cleaning before operation.
